notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with all core mechanics working—ship movement, asteroid splitting, UFO, scoring, lives, waves, and audio—minor issue is totalTime double-incremented in loop (added in both loop and update) but doesn't break gameplay.

A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with working waves, splitting rocks, UFOs, pause/restart, and responsive controls, but it misses some classic polish and has a few gameplay/rendering edge-case rough spots that keep it from scoring higher.
